title: Dynamic Dojutsu | Ahznb's Naruto Addon
description: Adds revamped variants of the dojutsu in Ahznb's Naruto Mod. It also adds other releases and items.
body:
### Dynamic Dojutsu is an add-on for AHZNB's Naruto Mod that overhauls Sharingan and Byakugan progression with trauma-based awakening, form-switching mechanics, advanced Mangekyō genjutsu, Ketsuryugan blood manipulation, multiple custom elemental releases, and new sage modes.


Requirements

AHZNB's Naruto Mod 0.3.1 is required for versions 1.3.0 and below

AHZNB's Naruto Mod 0.3.2 is required for versions 1.3.3 and above

Features

Dojutsu Overhauls:

Dynamic Byakugan: Progressive evolution system with Tenseigan transformation, form switching, and rare Golden variants

Dynamic Sharingan: Trauma-based awakening, 10+ unique Mangekyō variants (Itachi, Madara, 
Shisui, Fugaku, Naka, and more)

Ketsuryugan: Blood Dragon techniques, hemomancy, and blood manipulation abilities

Advanced Genjutsu: Tsukuyomi, Kotoamatsukami, Izanami, Izanagi

Eye Strain System: Realistic usage penalties with temporary blindness risks

New Elemental Releases:

Steel, Swift, Typhoon, Dark, and Blaze Release variants

Additional Content:
2 new Sage Modes: Axolotl and Slug Sage (summons and additional jutsu coming soon)

New Anbu Robe color variants, New Anbu mask, and Menma's Mask

Boss entities with unique drops

Resources

Wiki: https://trello.com/b/p7NYVEGP

Discord: https://discord.gg/dVfKt3f6Jj (for questions, suggestions, and bug reports)

Note: This addon requires the base Naruto mod to function.
